case_title: HUE VUONG VS. DIGITAL ENGRAVING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VUONG, HUE AS TO DEFENDANT DIGITAL ENGRAVING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VUONG, HUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIGITAL ENGRAVING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $9,725.34 PRINCIPAL, $45.14 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,995.48, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
